# Cargo Ship 3D Model

**Title**: Cargo ship
**Author**: hungry_drifter
**Source**: https://sketchfab.com/3d-models/cargo-ship-b7c97df584824ca682d26daabf401f87
**License**: [CC Attribution (CC-BY 4.0)](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

This 3D model is used under the Creative Commons Attribution license,
which requires that the original author be credited. The model has not
been modified other than format conversion (RAR/OBJ unpack) and the
addition of an auto-generated `cargo1.mtl` companion file mapping the
texture set provided in the original archive.

The triangle count of the imported model is ~73k.
